issues.sample: I purchased this 2020 Maserati Levante in 2023. The first month of driving it, it shut down in the middle of the street on Crenshaw Blvd. I freaked out and restarted it after few seconds. For the past years of  purchasing this vehicle, the engine light keeps coming on and off.The

narrative.headline: What 2020 Maserati Levante owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 2 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (100% of reports).
